title: Migration center
subtitle: Track who followed you over and who still needs a nudge.
statusAliveHelp: Enough of your members are talking for the room to feel real.
statusNotAliveHelp: The first week closed without enough activity. Keep inviting and start conversations.
statusPendingHelp: Still inside the first week. These numbers firm up once the week is up.
action_invite_members_body: Nobody has joined yet. Message the ten people who make your community what it is and send them the invite personally.
action_seed_conversation_body: People joined but the room is quiet. Post a prompt, ask a question, or run a small event so there is something to walk into.
action_nudge_inactive_title: Nudge the members who went quiet
action_nudge_inactive_body: Some members joined but never said anything. A short personal message brings most of them back.
action_share_progress_body: Your server is alive. Post a progress update where your community still gathers so the rest follow.
cohortTitle: Members who joined but haven't participated
cohortEmpty: Everyone who joined has taken part. Nothing to chase.
cohortFailed: Could not load who still needs a nudge.
honestyNote: Migration brings your channel structure across. Roles, members, and message history you move by hand for now.
